name: Baked Steak and Lima Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the lima beans; add 6 cups of water and bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
3. Remove from heat and let stand, covered, for 1 hour. Do not drain.
4. Cover and simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
5. Cook bacon in a Dutch oven until crisp. Drain and reserve drippings.
6. Crumble the bacon and set aside.
7. Coat the steak with flour and brown in hot drippings, pouring off excess fat.
8. Stir together tomato juice, brown sugar, salt, pepper, and mustard.
9. Pour the mixture over the beans and beef mixture.
10. Cover the dish and bake at 325°F for about 1 1/2 to 2 hours, or until tender.
11. Serve hot, topped with crumbled bacon and grated cheese to taste.
